image-to-base64.seoDesc: Convert small icons or SVGs into Data-URIs. Perfect for embedding directly in HTML or CSS to optimize page load times.

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert Unix timestamps to local time and back.
timestamp-converter.title: Unix Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.subtitle: Convert between Unix timestamps (seconds/millis) and human-readable dates.
timestamp-converter.instruction1: 10-digit timestamps represent seconds (s), and 13-digit timestamps represent milliseconds (ms).
timestamp-converter.instruction2: Conversions are based on your local time zone.
timestamp-converter.instruction3: When entering dates, YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss is recommended.
timestamp-converter.seoTitle: Unix Timestamp Converter: Online Epoch Date Tool
timestamp-converter.seoDesc: Convert Unix timestamps (seconds & milliseconds) to human-readable dates and vice versa. Support for real-time live clock, time zones, and common formatting tasks for developers and database administrators.
timestamp-converter.highlight1Desc: Seamlessly switch between second-level (10 digits) and millisecond-level (13 digits) timestamps commonly used in Java and JavaScript.
timestamp-converter.highlight2Desc: Monitor the current server time and epoch value in real-time, helping you debug race conditions or time-sensitive logic.
timestamp-converter.highlight3Desc: Our engine handles common date formats automatically, allowing you to paste and convert with minimal manual formatting.
timestamp-converter.disclaimer: Note: All conversions are performed relative to your browser's local time zone unless UTC is explicitly specified.

base-converter.name: Base Converter
base-converter.description: Convert between bases 2 to 36 for large integers.
base-converter.title: Any Base Converter
base-converter.subtitle: Convert values between any base from 2 to 36 with large number support.
base-converter.inputPlaceholder: Enter number to convert (supports big integers, negative numbers)...
base-converter.errorInvalidChars: Error: Input contains invalid characters for base {{base}}
base-converter.errorGeneric: Conversion failed, check your input format
base-converter.seoTitle: Universal Base Converter: Binary, Octal, Hex & Custom Bases
base-converter.seoDesc: Convert any number between bases 2 and 36 instantly. Our high-precision engine supports large integers (BigInt) and negative values, making it ideal for programmers and CS students.
base-converter.highlight1Desc: Uses JavaScript BigInt to handle values far beyond the standard precision of 64-bit floating point numbers.
base-converter.highlight2Desc: Go beyond standard binary and hex. Convert to base-3, base-12 (Duodecimal), base-36, and everything in between.
base-converter.highlight3Desc: Common transformations like Decimal to Hex are provided as presets to save you time during debugging.
base-converter.disclaimer: Note: For floating-point numbers, precision is guaranteed for the integer portion using our BigInt implementation.

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Convert between length, weight, volume, and temperature.
unit-converter.title: Unit Converter
unit-converter.subtitle: Quickly convert between common units like length, weight, volume, and temperature.
unit-converter.seoTitle: Universal Web Unit Converter: Accurate Conversions for Every Scenario
unit-converter.seoDesc: Whether you are a construction engineer used to using imperial units for overseas drawings, or a foodie baking according to foreign recipes, quickly breaking the barriers of weights and measures units formed by regional and historical factors is very valuable. This built-in toolbox provides high-precision constant comparison conversion services.
unit-converter.highlightsTitle: Core advantages of a clean weights and measures converter:
unit-converter.highlight1Desc: Compared to searching for formulas in search engines and then opening a mobile phone calculator to frantically multiply and divide, you only need to enter the base number here, and all derived metric, imperial, and US standards will instantly appear in the side panel.
unit-converter.highlight2Desc: For example, the conversion from Fahrenheit (°F) to Celsius (°C) is not a simple multiplication coefficient relationship, but has a complex intercept constant. The built-in converter of the system ensures the accurate application of these highly rigorous physical formulas, eliminating the pain of manual derivation.
unit-converter.highlight3Desc: Nowadays, to use exchange rates or unit conversions, people are often forced to download a large number of cleaning apps with advertising plug-ins. This is a native clean component mounted directly on the browser core, providing zero-disturbance silent office assistance for your computer and mobile phone.
unit-converter.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Due to the underlying binary precision truncation problem of floating point numbers in JavaScript compilation and operations, occasional slight deviations at the level of millions (for example, one hundred thousandth) of decimal places may occur, but these precision losses usually do not hinder your actual business applications.

time-converter.name: Time Converter
time-converter.description: Convert between time zones and dates instantly.
time-converter.title: Time & Timezone Converter
time-converter.subtitle: Convert time across major timezones instantly to assist in global coordination and scheduling.
time-converter.emptyTip: Please enter a valid date and time on the left
time-converter.seoTitle: Online Timezone Comparison Tool: Break Global Collaboration Barriers
time-converter.seoDesc: In global offices, cross-border gaming, or project synergy, converting between LA, London, or Beijing time can be frustrating. Policies like Daylight Saving Time (DST) make simple mental calculations unreliable. This calibrated tool eliminates scheduling headaches.
time-converter.highlightsTitle: Key advantages of using a multi-dimensional timeline:
time-converter.highlight1Desc: Built-in standard time slices for cities worldwide. Just set a 'departure anchor,' and the list translates it into local times instantly.
time-converter.highlight2Desc: Uses high-precision standard libraries. You don't need to remember when DST starts or ends; the system identifies it based on the date.
time-converter.highlight3Desc: Includes millisecond-level timestamps for developers to use in databases or logs, providing a bridge between UI and code.
time-converter.disclaimer: Tip: Always check business hour collisions when scheduling global meetings. Use the 'Now' button to quickly reset to current local time.

rmb-converter.seoDesc: Prevent contract tampering. Formally convert monetary amounts to traditional Chinese characters (like 壹, 贰) used in banking and legal documents.
rmb-converter.highlight1Desc: Automatically handles complex zero-placements (e.g., 1001.5 as '壹仟零壹元伍角') per banking standards.

rmb-converter.highlight3Desc: Securely calculate large amounts locally. No financial data ever touches our servers.

ppi-calculator.name: PPI Calculator
ppi-calculator.description: Calculate Pixels Per Inch based on size and resolution.
ppi-calculator.title: Screen PPI Calculator
ppi-calculator.subtitle: Enter resolution and physical size to calculate Pixels Per Inch and evaluate Retina display quality.
ppi-calculator.seoTitle: Online PPI Calculator: Unmask the Truth About Screen Sharpness
ppi-calculator.seoDesc: When buying smartphones or monitors, ads talk about '4K' and 'Ultra-wide'. But resolution alone doesn't determine sharpness. PPI (Pixels Per Inch) is the gold standard for evaluating image quality.
ppi-calculator.highlight1Desc: PPI isn't just simple division. It uses the Pythagorean theorem to calculate the 'pixel diagonal' from width and height px, then divides it by physical inches.
ppi-calculator.highlight2Desc: Retina display refers to a density where the human eye can't distinguish pixels at typical viewing distances. For phones, this is often ≥326 PPI.
ppi-calculator.highlight3Desc: Helps UI designers calculate export ratios (@2x, @3x) based on target device densities to ensure crisp rendering.
ppi-calculator.disclaimer: Note: PPI (Image density) differs from DPI (Printer ink dots). This tool specifically measures light-emitting pixel arrays for screens.

hex-string-converter.didYouKnowDesc: Hexadecimal (Hex) is a base-16 numbering system. In computing, it is often used as a human-friendly representation of binary data. A single byte (8 bits) can be represented by exactly two Hex characters.

chinese-crypto.introSm2: SM2: Public key cryptography based on ECC, providing higher security than RSA at same key lengths.
chinese-crypto.introSm3: SM3: Message digest algorithm for digital signatures, producing a 256-bit hash.
chinese-crypto.introSm4: SM4: Block symmetric encryption for replacing DES/AES, using 128-bit blocks and keys.
chinese-crypto.errorSm4Key: SM4 key must be a 32-character hex string (16 bytes)
